metadata.title:
INTERSTATE


FAIR EXHIBIT

The Union Fuel & Ice Compmy


Shows Public Spirit.

pages.raw_text:
The Union Fuel & Ice Co. are
furnishing free to the Interstats
fair the coal being used in the az
fees of the fair in the Manufac-
turers' building, and on the stesm
rollers, as well as the coal f0r
threshing machine engines dis
played on the ground. This coal
is given Jointly by the Union Fuel
& Ice Co. and the Hillcrest Coal
& Coke Co. They have the finest
fuel exhibit on the grounds, show
ing:


Hillcrest steam COAL


Hillcrest screened coal.


Hillcrest slack coal.


Canada West coal.


Gait lump coal.


Banff anthracite coal.


Smith lump coal.


Sheridan lump coal.


Pennsylvania anthracite coal


keystone Lilly blacksmith coal.


The different kinds of coal arc
tastefully exhibited in baskets.
and they have large block Of
Canada West coal on which they
have guessing contest as to the
weight of the coal. This exhibit
is in charge of e. T. Fitzsimmons
of the sales department of the
Union Fuel g. Ice Co.
Cement Exhibit


They are exhibiting Exshaw inn
ported cement in very interest
ing and instructive way, showing
the different stages of the process
es of manufacture from the raw
material to the finished product,
showing cement blocks and trim
mings manufactured by the Spo-
kane Concrete Co. and cement
bricks In the fireplace exhibited
by the Spokane Tile & Mantel Co.
This exhibit is in charge of j. g.
Dean, chemist in chief of the
/ Western Canada Cement & Coal
Co. of Exshaw, Alta.
! Contractors, architects and civil
engineers will find the cement ex-
hibit very interesting and instruc-
tive. The city of Spokane is pur-
chasing this cement for city con-
crete work, and the Washington
| Water Power Co. are using 1t in
the construction of their dam at
Little Falls, 20 miles below Spo-
kane, in the Spokane river. The
Union Fuel & Ice Co. are the
largest Wholesale and retail deal
ers of fuel and cement In eastern
Washington.
